title: Vanilla Delights
description: Adds 40+ new dishes using only vanilla ingredients. Add more decorative variety
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/cUmG7as.png) ***

*** ## 📜 Essence This mod expands Farmer’s Delight by adding 40+ new food items — all made using only vanilla Minecraft ingredients. It gives more variety to survival cooking without adding anything outside the base game. It also brings more decorative variety for the Cooking Pot, Stove, Stone Cabinet, and different Cutting Board variants. ## 🎯 Features - 30+ new food items crafted fully from vanilla resources. - Full Farmer’s Delight integration: cutting, cooking, crafting. - Balanced recipes that feel natural in Minecraft survival. - Creative use of common ingredients like melon, honey, and berries. - Meals range from simple snacks to big feasts. - Clean and simple — no extra mods or new crops needed. - Feature to recolor the Cooking Pot - Expanded set of decorative Stove, Stone Cabinet, Cutting Board variants ## 📝 Description Vanilla Delight is for players who love the simplicity of Minecraft’s vanilla world but want more food variety. This mod brings over 30 new recipes, all made with the stuff you already know — no new crops, no strange ingredients, just fresh ways to use what’s there. ![](https://i.imgur.com/65sE7rd.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/WThATOY.png) With Farmer’s Delight’s cooking system, you can turn basic items like melon slices, honey bottles, and sweet berries into tasty dishes like Melon Pie, Honey Pudding, and Sweet Berry Custard. Each recipe has been balanced to feel right for survival, giving you better hunger and saturation without breaking the game’s natural flow. By using any of the 16 dyes on a Cooking Pot, you can tint it into the matching shade. ## 🙏 Credits - Big thanks to the [Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) team for making Minecraft’s food system so flexible and inspiring. - Special thanks to Ext_Ramen496 for the Chinese language support ❤️ - Special thanks to Skff1 for the Russian language support ❤️ - Shoutout to everyone in the community who shared ideas or gave feedback. ## 🗒️ Notes - This mod idea came from wanting more cooking options without needing extra mods or crops.
